AI.rationale: NVDA $4T market cap milestone (July 9), H20 export ban reversal (July 15) with 15% China revenue share; GOOGL Q2 $96.4B (+14%), Cloud +32%, capex $85B; MSFT FY25 Q4 $76.4B (+18%), Azure +39%, Q1 FY26 Azure guide 37% CC. Real revenue, growing capex.

rockets_spacecraft.rationale: RKLB Q1 $123M (+32%), Q2 guide $130-140M; Space Systems now majority of revenue; Neutron 'green-light schedule' for 2025 launch per SpaceNews, U.S. Air Force point-to-point task order. Pre-Neutron commercial inflection.

robotics.rationale: No material BOTZ-specific news in July 2025 lookback from curated robotics sources. Industrial robotics holdings (Keyence, Fanuc, ABB) not events-driven this month; ETF performance bleeds through from NVDA exposure but no robotics-specific signal.

engineered_biology.rationale: ARKG ~23% YTD recovering from drawdowns; Arbor Biotechnology dosed first patient in PH1 CRISPR trial July 2025; Intellia Phase III running. Genome editing market only ~$5B 2026 projected.

quantum.rationale: $2.5B DOE Quantum Leadership Act introduced (Feb, in Senate committee through July); National Quantum Algorithm Center launched July 2025; QTUM only +0.7% in July, lagging tech category by 140bp. Pre-commercial, under-owned.

nuclear_fusion.rationale: Google-CFS 200 MW PPA (June 30 / July 2) — largest corporate fusion offtake ever; $2.6B in fusion sector funding 12 months to mid-2025; Palisades NRC restart decision pending. CFS ARC online early 2030s. Capital formation phase.

general_markets.rationale: Fed pause; AGG ~6.4% YTD; gold ~$3,288 end-June, IAU AUM at largest size since Nov 2024; BIL near 4.9-5.0% pre-cut.
